---
title: "179: Widening gap"
date: "2026-03-18"
categories:
  - gtUtils
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)


# --- Pull data from kenpom API 
# archive_2024 <- kp_get_archive(date = "2024-03-17") |>
#  dplyr::mutate(season = "2023-24")

# archive_2025 <- kp_get_archive(date = "2025-03-16") |>
#  dplyr::mutate(season = "2024-25")

# current_2026 <- ranks |>
#  dplyr::mutate(season = "2025-26")

# all_seasons <- dplyr::bind_rows(archive_2024, archive_2025, current_2026)

# write.csv(all_seasons, "kp_rank_data.csv")

all_seasons <- readr::read_csv("kp_rank_data.csv")

# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

```

### Gap plot

```{r gap-plot, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

plot_data <- all_seasons |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    seed_tier = dplyr::case_when(
      Seed %in% 1:4   ~ "1-4",
      Seed %in% 5:8   ~ "5-8",
      Seed %in% 9:12  ~ "9-12",
      Seed %in% 13:16 ~ "13-16",
      TRUE            ~ "Unseeded"
    ),
    seed_tier = factor(seed_tier, levels = c("1-4", "5-8", "9-12", "13-16", "Unseeded")),
    season = factor(season, levels = c("2023-24", "2024-25", "2025-26"))
  )

# --- Compute median AdjEM per seed tier ---
tier_medians <- plot_data |>
  dplyr::filter(seed_tier != "Unseeded") |>
  dplyr::group_by(season, seed_tier) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    median_adjEM = round(median(AdjEM, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- Formatting for the Dynamic Subtitle ---
med <- tier_medians |>
  dplyr::mutate(key = paste0(season, "_", seed_tier)) |>
  dplyr::select(key, median_adjEM) |>
  tibble::deframe()

# --- Colors ---
col_14   <- "#2166ac"
col_58   <- "#4dac26"
col_912  <- "#ef8a62" 
col_1316 <- "#b2182b"

# --- Subtitle with Bold Seeds ---
subtitle_text <- glue::glue(
  "KenPom adjusted efficiency margin for all teams across the last three seasons.<br>",
  "Median AdjEM by seed line:<br>",
  "<b>Seeds:&nbsp;</b><span style='color:{col_14}'><b> &nbsp;1-4</b></span> | ",
  "<span style='color:{col_58}'><b>5-8</b></span> | ",
  "<span style='color:{col_912}'><b>9-12</b></span> | ",
  "<span style='color:{col_1316}'><b>13-16</b></span><br>",
  "<b>2025-26: &nbsp;+{med['2025-26_1-4']} | +{med['2025-26_5-8']} | +{med['2025-26_9-12']} | {med['2025-26_13-16']}</b><br>",
  "<span style='color:#888888'>2024-25: &nbsp;+{med['2024-25_1-4']} | +{med['2024-25_5-8']} | +{med['2024-25_9-12']} | +{med['2024-25_13-16']}</span><br>",
  "<span style='color:#888888'>2023-24: &nbsp;+{med['2023-24_1-4']} | +{med['2023-24_5-8']} | +{med['2023-24_9-12']} | +{med['2023-24_13-16']}</span><br>"
)

# --- Rank labels (cleaning up "Rank" text) ---
rank_labels <- plot_data |>
  dplyr::filter(RankAdjEM %in% c(1, 25, 100, 250, 300, 350)) |>
  dplyr::select(season, RankAdjEM, AdjEM) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    label_text = ifelse(RankAdjEM == 1, paste0("Rank ", RankAdjEM), as.character(RankAdjEM))
  )

# --- Plot ---
gap_plot <- (\(df) {
  ggplot2::ggplot(df, ggplot2::aes(x = 1, y = AdjEM)) +
    # Unseeded — gray cloud
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, seed_tier == "Unseeded"),
      color = "#cccccc",
      alpha = 0.25,
      size = 1.1,
      position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, seed = 123)
    ) +
    # Seeded — larger points
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, seed_tier != "Unseeded"),
      ggplot2::aes(color = seed_tier),
      alpha = 0.8,
      size = 2.4,
      position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, seed = 123)
    ) +
    # Median "Shelves" — Wider and more prominent
    ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
      data = tier_medians,
      ggplot2::aes(x = 1, y = median_adjEM, ymin = median_adjEM, ymax = median_adjEM, color = seed_tier),
      width = 0.65, 
      linewidth = 1.4, 
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    # Reference labels — "Rank" only on the first one
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = rank_labels,
      ggplot2::aes(x = 0.5, y = AdjEM, label = label_text),
      hjust = 1,
      size = 2.8,
      color = "#555555",
      family = "Roboto Condensed",
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      values = c("1-4" = col_14, "5-8" = col_58, "9-12" = col_912, "13-16" = col_1316)
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.2, 1.8)) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(-35, 42),
      breaks = seq(-30, 40, by = 10),
      oob = scales::squish
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~season, ncol = 3) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "College basketball's **widening gap**",
      subtitle = subtitle_text,
      x = NULL,
      y = "Adjusted Efficiency Margin",
      caption = "Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart | data via kenpom.com\n2023-24 & 2024-25 data from Selection Sunday",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(hjust = 0.5, size = 22,  family = "Roboto Condensed"),
      plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(hjust = 0.5, size = 10, lineheight = 1.6,  family = "Roboto Condensed"),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5,  family = "Roboto Condensed"),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_blank()
    )
})(plot_data)


ggplot2::ggsave("kp_gaps.png", gap_plot,
                width = 8, height = 9.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

gap_plot

```

### Gap table

```{r gap-tbl, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Build table data ---
seed_medians <- plot_data |>
    dplyr::filter(Seed %in% 1:16) |>
    dplyr::group_by(Seed, season) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
        median_adjEM = round(median(AdjEM, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
        names_from  = season,
        values_from = median_adjEM
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(Seed)

# --- Header ---
bball_header <- glue::glue(
    "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
    <div>
      <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
      style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
    </div>
    <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
      <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>College basketball's <br>widening gap</span>
      <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>
        Shows the<b> median adjusted efficiency margin by seed</b> across the last three NCAA Tournaments.<br>
      </span>
    </div>
    <div>
      <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
      style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
    </div>
  </div>
  <br>"
)

# --- Table ---
gap_tbl <- seed_medians |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |> 
    gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
        `Seed`    = list(heading = "Seed",    subtitle = ""),
        `2023-24` = list(heading = "2024", subtitle = ""),
        `2024-25` = list(heading = "2025", subtitle = ""),
        `2025-26` = list(heading = "2026", subtitle = ""),
        heading_color  = "black",
        subtitle_color = "gray"
    ) |>
    gt::data_color(
        columns   = c(`2023-24`, `2024-25`, `2025-26`),
        direction = "row",
        method    = "numeric",
        palette = c("#e5f5e0", "#74c476", "#00441b"),
        alpha     = 0.85
    ) |>
    gt::fmt_number(
        columns  = c(`2023-24`, `2024-25`, `2025-26`),
        decimals = 1,
        force_sign = TRUE
    ) |>
    gt::cols_align(align = "center", columns = gt::everything()) |>
    gt::cols_width(
        Seed      ~ gt::px(60),
        `2023-24` ~ gt::px(120),
        `2024-25` ~ gt::px(120),
        `2025-26` ~ gt::px(120)
    ) |>
    gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(bball_header)) |>
    gt::tab_source_note(
        source_note = gt::html(
            "<hr>2025-26 data as of March 17 via <b>kenpom.com</b><br>
       2023-24 & 2024-25 snapshots taken on Selection Sunday<br>
       <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your Chart</b>"
        )
    ) |>
    gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(480)) |>
    gt::tab_style(
        style = list(gt::cell_borders(
            sides  = c("left", "right", "top", "bottom"),
            color  = "black",
            weight = gt::px(2)
        )),
        locations = list(
            gt::cells_body(),
            gt::cells_column_labels(),
            gt::cells_row_groups()
        )
    ) |>
    gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#0d1e2d", "#c1d6e2", "#f07e1d"))

gt_save_crop(
    gap_tbl,
    file       = "gap_tbl.png",
    whitespace = 40,
    bg         = "#FFFDF5"
)

gap_tbl
```

### Game Score Grid

```{r gs-grid, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}


# ── Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tt <- readr::read_csv("tt.csv")
bracket_info <- readr::read_csv("https://t.co/WwZZVMuKsd") |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    team = dplyr::if_else(team == "Pennsylvania", "Penn", team),
    team = dplyr::if_else(team == "LIU Brooklyn", "LIU", team),
    team = dplyr::if_else(team == "North Carolina St.", "N.C. State", team),
  )

ncaat_teams <- bracket_info |>
  dplyr::pull(team)

# ── Helper: always format to 1 decimal ───────────────────────────────────────
fmt1 <- function(x) formatC(round(x, 1), format = "f", digits = 1)

# ── Build cells ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
team_cells <- tt |>
  dplyr::filter(team %in% ncaat_teams) |>
  dplyr::group_by(team) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    median_gs = fmt1(median(game_score)),
    high_gs   = fmt1(max(game_score)),
    low_gs    = fmt1(min(game_score)),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    bracket_info |> dplyr::select(team, seed, region),
    by = "team"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(eliminated = team %in% c("N.C. State", "UMBC")) |>  # <-- before gt_cbb_teams
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team, include_name = FALSE, logo_height = 18) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    cell = glue::glue(
      "<div style='text-align: center; line-height: 1.6;'>
        <div style='display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;'>
          {team}
          <span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 13px;'>{median_gs}</span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span style='color: #1a9641; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: bold;'>▲ {high_gs}</span>
          <span style='color: #d7191c; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: bold;'>&nbsp;▼ {low_gs}</span>
        </div>
      </div>"
    ),
    cell = dplyr::if_else(
      eliminated,
      glue::glue("<div style='opacity: 0.35;'>{cell}</div>"),
      cell
    )
  )

# ── Handle play-in seeds ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
team_cells_combined <- team_cells |>
  dplyr::select(seed, region, cell, eliminated) |>
  dplyr::group_by(seed, region) |>
  dplyr::arrange(eliminated, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    cell = paste(cell, collapse = "<hr style='margin: 2px 0; border-color: #cccccc;'>"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Pivot: rows = seeds, columns = regions ────────────────────────────────────
grid <- team_cells_combined |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = region,
    values_from = cell
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(seed) |>
  dplyr::select(seed, East, South, West, Midwest)

# ── Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
    <div>
     <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
     style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
   </div>
   <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
     <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>2026 Field of 68: Torvik Game Score Grid</span>
     <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows the <b>median Game Score</b> for every team in the 2026 NCAA Tournament.<br>
     <span style='color: #1a9641; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: bold;'>▲ Season high</span> &nbsp;|&nbsp;
     <span style='color: #d7191c; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: bold;'>▼ Season low</span></span>
   </div>
   <div>
     <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
     style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
   </div>
 </div>
<br>"
)

# ── Table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
grid |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(East, South, West, Midwest)) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    seed    = "Seed",
    East    = "East",
    South   = "South",
    West    = "West",
    Midwest = "Midwest"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(East, South, West, Midwest)) |>
  gt::cols_align(align = "center", columns = seed) |>
  gt::cols_width(
    seed    ~ gt::px(55),
    East    ~ gt::px(150),
    South   ~ gt::px(150),
    West    ~ gt::px(150),
    Midwest ~ gt::px(150)
  ) |>
  # row shading by first-round matchup pairs
  # shade A — 1v16, 3v14, 5v12, 7v10
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = seed %in% c(1, 16, 3, 14, 5, 12, 7, 10)),
    style = gt::cell_fill(color = "#ebebeb")
  ) |>
  # shade B — 2v15, 4v13, 6v11, 8v9 stay white/default
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = gt::html(
      "<hr>data via barttorkvik.com | theme from {gtUtils}<br>
       Game Score ranges from 0 (bad) to 50 (average) to 100 (perfect)<br>
       Table by Chris at Bless your Chart"
    )
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc")) |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::px(680)
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(
    color          = "black",
    weight         = 2,
    include_labels = FALSE
  ) -> grid_tbl

gt_save_crop(
  grid_tbl,
  file       = "ncaat_grid.png",
  whitespace = 60,
  bg         = "white"
)

grid_tbl

```
